sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Chinese robotaxi companies forge ahead with UAE expansion despite Iran war
feed.summary: Despite the ongoing Iran war, at least three Chinese robotaxi companies, Didi, WeRide, and Pony.ai, are pushing forward with their expansion plans into the Middle East, particularly the UAE. Didi announced its first overseas robotaxi test in the UAE later this year, WeRide has launched fare-charging services in Dubai, and Pony.ai is pursuing commercial operations. These companies are making the Middle East an early launch market for their global expansion.

feed.title: Wellgistics Health and Kare PharmTech Execute Joint Venture Expanding Access to 200,000+ Patient Lives
feed.summary: Wellgistics Health and Kare PharmTech's subsidiary, Kare Rx Hub, have entered into a definitive joint venture agreement. This collaboration aims to create a technology-driven platform to streamline the prescription journey, enhance patient access to therapies, and improve the efficiency of pharmaceutical commercialization. The integrated platform will combine their technological and operational teams, supporting a growing network that can reach over 200,000 patient lives.

feed.title: FT Vest美國股票增強與適度緩衝主動型ETF-4月-XAPR-ETF試算
feed.summary: The article provides a detailed overview and trial calculation for the FT Vest U.S. Equity Enhanced & Moderate Buffer Active ETF - April (XAPR). It outlines various data points and analytical tools available for this ETF, including real-time quotes, technical analysis, net value tables, basic information, dividend records, and performance analysis. The content emphasizes that all performance calculations are based on original currency rewards and consider dividend distributions, noting that past performance does not guarantee future results.

feed.title: Viasat, Turksat and SKYFive Arabia Announce Planned Collabor
feed.summary: Viasat, Türksat, and SKYFive Arabia have announced plans for a strategic roaming collaboration to enhance next-generation in-flight connectivity (IFC) across Türkiye, Europe, and the Middle East-Africa. This initiative aims to provide seamless cross-border connectivity for commercial airlines and private aviation by integrating existing A2G and EAN networks with Türksat's developing A2G network in Türkiye, all utilizing the same S-band spectrum. The collaboration is expected to improve service continuity, expand route coverage, and create a more scalable and commercially attractive model for IFC, especially given Türkiye's significant air travel market.

feed.title: Mizuho upgrades American Tower stock rating on improving fundamentals
feed.summary: Mizuho has upgraded American Tower (NYSE:AMT) to Outperform from Neutral and increased its price target to $205, citing improving fundamentals and undervalued data center assets. The firm projects enhanced U.S. and international cell tower fundamentals due to AI-related and 5G investments, along with EBITDA margin benefits. American Tower also offers a 4.1% dividend yield and has consistently raised its dividend for 15 years.

feed.title: Caterpillar Names Kyle Epley as New CFO in Leadership Transition
feed.summary: Caterpillar has announced that Kyle Epley will succeed Andrew Bonfield as Chief Financial Officer on May 1, 2026. Bonfield, who is retiring in October 2026, oversaw a period of record financial performance for the company, including $67.6 billion in sales and revenues in 2025. Epley, a 30-year veteran of Caterpillar, currently serves as senior vice president of Global Finance Services.

feed.title: JPMorgan Adjusts Price Target on Duke Energy to $139 From $138, Maintains Neutral Rating
feed.summary: JPMorgan has increased its price target for Duke Energy (DUK) to $139 from $138, while reiterating a Neutral rating on the stock. This adjustment comes amidst other analyst actions on Duke Energy, including BMO Capital and Barclays also modifying their price targets. The article also touches upon the company's profile and recent news, including regulatory approvals for new natural gas generation facilities.

feed.title: Moderna to Report First Quarter 2026 Financial Results on Friday, May 1, 2026
feed.summary: Moderna, Inc. (NASDAQ:MRNA) announced it will report its first quarter 2026 financial results on Friday, May 1, 2026. The biotech company will host a live conference call and webcast at 8:00 a.m. ET to discuss the results and provide a corporate update. The webcast will be available on Moderna's investor relations website, and an archived version will be accessible for one year.

feed.title: Coca-Cola bottling partner Kandhari Global names Aditya Vasishtha as VP
feed.summary: Kandhari Global Beverages Private Limited (KGBPL), a key bottling partner of The Coca-Cola Company in India, has appointed Aditya Vasishtha as Vice President of Government Affairs & Strategic Partnerships. Vasishtha will be responsible for government relations, strategic partnerships, sustainability, and communications. He previously worked at Coca-Cola India and brings experience in business strategy and public policy to his new role.

feed.title: Moderna schedules May 1 webcast for first-quarter 2026 results
feed.summary: Moderna (NASDAQ: MRNA) announced it will report its first-quarter 2026 financial results on Friday, May 1, 2026, with a live conference call and webcast at 8:00 a.m. ET. The company will also provide a corporate update during the call, with an archived webcast available two hours later for one year. This announcement follows a historical pattern for scheduling earnings calls, which has typically resulted in limited short-term stock price impact.

feed.title: Bunge plans May 13 webcast from BMO Global Farm to Market event
feed.summary: Bunge Global SA (NYSE: BG) announced that its management will participate in a fireside chat at the BMO Global Farm to Market Conference on May 13, 2026, at 1:15 p.m. EST. Registration for the webcast will be available on Bunge's website in the "Events & Presentations" section. The webcast will also be accessible for on-demand viewing for approximately three months after the presentation.

feed.title: Labcorp Launches FDA-Cleared Fentanyl Test Delivering Results in 10 Minutes
feed.summary: Labcorp has launched the Labcorp Fentanyl Urine Visual Test, the first FDA-cleared rapid fentanyl test manufactured in the U.S. This test provides results in 10 minutes, assisting healthcare providers in emergency departments, hospitals, and clinics with quick and actionable information regarding suspected fentanyl exposure. The test detects norfentanyl, a fentanyl metabolite, offering a longer detection window and is available through Labcorp Point of Care.

feed.title: Labcorp's new 10-minute fentanyl test gives ER teams faster answers
feed.summary: Labcorp has launched a new FDA-cleared rapid fentanyl urine test that delivers results in just 10 minutes. This test detects norfentanyl, a fentanyl metabolite, offering a detection window of up to 48 hours, which assists healthcare providers in emergency departments and clinics with quick decision-making for suspected fentanyl exposure. The test is intended for preliminary screening by qualified professionals in CLIA-certified settings and results should be confirmed by laboratory methods.

feed.title: JPMorgan Adjusts Price Target on MSCI to $670 From $705, Maintains Overweight Rating
feed.summary: JPMorgan has revised its price target for MSCI Inc. (MSCI) down to $670 from $705, while retaining an "Overweight" rating on the stock. This adjustment reflects an updated outlook from the bank regarding the financial information services company.

feed.title: Bank of America says private credit portfolio finance loans about $20 bln
feed.summary: Bank of America announced that its portfolio of private credit finance loans stands at approximately $20 billion. This information was released alongside their first-quarter earnings report, where the bank reported a profit of $1.11 per share and revenue of $30.27 billion, surpassing analyst estimates.

feed.title: Leidos Forms Joint Venture with Altaris and Analogic
feed.summary: Leidos Holdings is forming a joint venture with Altaris affiliates and Analogic, combining Leidos’ Security Enterprise Solutions and Industrial Automation operations with Analogic. Leidos will hold a 41.5% stake in the new company, which will operate under the Analogic brand and focus on accelerating AI-native and 3D imaging solutions for security screening. This move allows Leidos to redirect capital toward its core growth priorities under the NorthStar 2030 strategy.

feed.title: BofA raises CenterPoint Energy stock price target to $44 on valuation
feed.summary: BofA Securities has increased its price target for CenterPoint Energy (NYSE:CNP) stock to $44 from $42, while maintaining a Neutral rating, adjusting its valuation to 2028 using peer group multiples. The utility company's stock is currently trading near its 52-week high, and BofA analysts have updated EPS estimates, reflecting the company's target growth rate. CenterPoint Energy has also been active in financing, issuing senior secured system restoration bonds and convertible senior notes, and continues its consistent dividend payments.

feed.title: Morgan Stanley Bitcoin ETF reaches $83.6M, market reaction muted
feed.summary: Morgan Stanley's Bitcoin ETF has accumulated $83.6 million in holdings, signaling real institutional investment in the crypto market. Despite this significant inflow, the immediate market reaction has been muted, with Bitcoin's price expectations for April 15 remaining flat. However, long-term optimism is evident, as indicated by a 36.5% probability of Bitcoin reaching $100,000 by year-end.

feed.title: UK government hands Boeing $1 billion military helicopter contract
feed.summary: The UK government has awarded Boeing a three-year, $1.19 billion (879 million pound) contract to maintain and support its army Apache attack helicopters and Royal Air Force Chinook heavy-lift helicopters. This agreement ensures ongoing operational readiness for these critical military aircraft.

feed.title: PNC Financial beats profit estimates despite revenue miss
feed.summary: PNC Financial Services Group reported first-quarter earnings that surpassed analyst expectations, driven by its acquisition of FirstBank and strong legacy loan growth. Despite missing revenue estimates, the bank achieved adjusted earnings per share of $4.32 and saw net interest income rise by 14% year-over-year. The company also returned $1.4 billion to shareholders through share repurchases and dividends.

feed.title: Q4 Earnings Outperformers: APA Corporation (NASDAQ:APA) And The Rest Of The Mixed or Offshore Upstream E&P Stocks
feed.summary: This article reviews the Q4 earnings performance of mixed or offshore upstream E&P stocks, highlighting APA Corporation (NASDAQ:APA) as an outperformer with strong revenue and EPS beats. It also covers the best performer, Gevo (NASDAQ:GEVO), and the weakest, Vitesse Energy (NYSE:VTS), along with results for Core Natural Resources (NYSE:CNR) and Seadrill (NYSE:SDRL). The piece concludes with a market update noting a shift in investor focus from AI to geopolitical risks, particularly the US's conflict with Iran impacting oil supply and inflation concerns.

feed.title: Here's What to Expect From Incyte’s Next Earnings Report
feed.summary: Incyte Corporation (INCY) is expected to announce strong Q1 2026 results on April 28, with analysts forecasting a 36% increase in EPS to $1.21. The biopharmaceutical company has seen its stock climb 65% over the past year, outperforming the S&P 500, due to strong revenue growth from key drugs and pipeline advancements. Analysts maintain a "Moderate Buy" rating for INCY, with an average price target suggesting an 11.9% upside.

feed.title: Telefônica Brasil S.A. stock (BRVIVTACNOR0): Why its telecom dominance in Brazil matter more now for global investors?
feed.summary: Telefônica Brasil S.A. (BRVIVTACNOR0) is positioned for steady growth in Brazil's heating telecom market, appealing to global investors seeking diversified exposure. The company leverages its dominant market share in mobile and fixed broadband, focusing on expanding 5G networks and fiber optics under the Vivo brand. Its integrated business model, emphasis on enterprise solutions, and high dividend yield make it an attractive defensive play in emerging markets despite regulatory and currency risks.

feed.title: UHG Stockholder Alert: Shareholder Rights Law Firm Robbins
feed.summary: Robbins LLP has filed a class action lawsuit against United Homes Group, Inc. (UHG) on behalf of investors who purchased securities between May 19, 2025, and February 22, 2026. The lawsuit alleges that UHG's controlling shareholder, Michael Nieri, took actions to devalue the company and force a sale not in the best interest of public investors. This resulted in a cash-out transaction at $1.18 per share, representing a significant discount from the preceding trading price of $2.38.

feed.title: Patton Fund Management Inc. Reduces Holdings in Citizens Financial Group, Inc. $CFG
feed.summary: Patton Fund Management Inc. significantly reduced its stake in Citizens Financial Group (NYSE:CFG) by 93.6% in the fourth quarter, selling 58,874 shares and retaining only 4,057 shares valued at $237,000. Meanwhile, corporate insider Susan Lamonica also sold 13,258 shares, decreasing her holding by 7.4%. Despite these sales, institutional ownership remains high at 94.90%, and analysts largely maintain a "Moderate Buy" rating with an average target price of $69.14.

feed.title: Aesthetic-Forward Mother's Day Collaborations
feed.summary: Bath & Body Works and Vera Bradley have teamed up for a limited-edition Mother's Day collection, launched on March 23. This collaboration features two new fragrances, Peach Blossom & Nectar and Blue Washed Sky, across body care, home fragrance, home decor, and accessories. Vera Bradley's signature patterns are integrated with the scents, creating visually and aromatically cohesive products ranging from small PocketBacs to Eau de Parfums.

feed.title: eBay Inc. $EBAY Holdings Lowered by Patton Fund Management Inc.
feed.summary: Patton Fund Management Inc. significantly reduced its stake in eBay Inc. by 93.3% in the fourth quarter of 2025, selling 38,420 shares and retaining 2,743 shares valued at approximately $239,000. Despite this, eBay reported a strong Q4, beating EPS and revenue expectations, raising its quarterly dividend, and providing positive Q1 guidance. The article also highlights recent insider selling, various institutional investor activities, and positive and neutral market sentiments regarding eBay's operations and market position.

feed.title: PNC Financial Services : Financial Supplement Q1 2026
feed.summary: PNC Financial Services has released its unaudited Financial Supplement for the first quarter of 2026. The report details consolidated financial results, including balance sheets, income statements, net interest margin, and credit loss information. Key financial data includes interest income, interest expense, noninterest income, and breakdowns across its Retail Banking, Corporate & Institutional Banking, and Asset Management Group segments.

feed.title: JPMorgan Chase (AMJB) prices 5.25% callable notes due 2036, callable 2028–2035
feed.summary: JPMorgan Chase & Co. has priced 5.25% callable fixed-rate notes due April 30, 2036. The notes pay interest annually and are callable semiannually from April 30, 2028, through October 30, 2035. These unsecured obligations are not FDIC insured and are subject to resolution/rank risks as described in the firm's resolution strategy.

feed.title: Earnings Flash (PNC) The PNC Financial Services Group, Inc. Posts Q1 Adjusted EPS $4.32 per Share
feed.summary: The PNC Financial Services Group, Inc. reported its Q1 adjusted EPS at $4.32 per share. The company's Q1 revenue was $6.17 billion, falling short of the FactSet estimate of $6.24 billion. This financial update was published on April 15, 2026.

feed.title: Smurfit Westrock to Announce 2026 First Quarter Results on April 30, 2026
feed.summary: Smurfit Westrock plc (NYSE:SW; LSE:SWR) will release its first quarter 2026 financial results on Thursday, April 30, 2026, at 6:30 am ET (11:30 am BST). The earnings release and related materials will be accessible on smurfitwestrock.com. Following the release, senior management will host a webcast at 7:30 am ET (12:30 pm BST) for analysts and institutional investors.

feed.title: Smurfit Westrock to Announce 2026 First Quarter Results on April 30, 2026
feed.summary: Smurfit Westrock (NYSE: SW; LSE:SWR) will release its first-quarter 2026 financial results on April 30, 2026, at 6:30 AM ET. The company will also host a webcast for analysts and institutional investors on the same day at 7:30 AM ET to discuss the results. Related materials and webcast registration will be available on their investor relations website.

feed.title: PNC posts $1.8B Q1 profit as net interest income rises 6% | PNC Stock News
feed.summary: PNC Financial Services Group reported a net income of $1.8 billion for Q1 2026, with diluted EPS of $4.13 ($4.32 adjusted), despite a decrease from Q4 2025. The company's net interest income rose by 6%, and average loans increased by 7%, significantly boosted by the acquisition of FirstBank. PNC returned $1.4 billion to shareholders through dividends and share repurchases, with a further $600-700 million in repurchases expected in Q2 2026.

feed.title: Analogic to merge with Leidos security units, form private firm By Investing.com
feed.summary: Analogic Corporation and Leidos, Inc. announced a definitive agreement to combine Analogic with Leidos’ Security Enterprise Solutions, Ports & Borders, and Industrial Automation businesses. The new entity will operate as a privately held company under the Analogic brand, led by Analogic's current CEO, Tom Ripp. The transaction, expected to close in the second half of 2026, aims to expand Analogic’s product portfolio and sales channels.

feed.title: EGBN Initiated Coverage by Raymond James -- Strong Buy Rating An
feed.summary: Raymond James has initiated coverage on Eagle Bancorp (EGBN) with a Strong Buy rating and a $32.00 price target, signaling confidence in the company's future performance. However, GuruFocus assesses EGBN as approximately 26.4% overvalued with a GF Value™ of $21.06 compared to its current price of $26.61, indicating a limited margin of safety for investors. The stock's GF Score™ of 67 suggests moderate potential for long-term returns, with strengths in momentum and financial stability but lower growth prospects.

feed.title: Transcend Capital Advisors LLC Cuts Holdings in Caterpillar Inc. $CAT
feed.summary: Transcend Capital Advisors LLC significantly reduced its stake in Caterpillar Inc. by 44.1% in Q4, selling 1,411 shares and retaining 1,791 shares valued at about $1.03 million. This comes despite broadly upbeat analyst ratings and several firms raising price targets after Caterpillar's strong Q4 earnings, where EPS and revenue beat expectations. The article also highlights heavy insider selling during the last quarter and ongoing investor interest due to the company's connection to the AI/data-center boom.

feed.title: Patten Group Inc. Invests $1.04 Million in Bristol Myers Squibb Company $BMY
feed.summary: Patten Group Inc. initiated a new position in Bristol Myers Squibb Company (NYSE:BMY) in Q4, acquiring 19,288 shares valued at approximately $1.04 million. This investment comes as other institutional investors have also adjusted their holdings in the biopharmaceutical company. Meanwhile, EVP David V. Elkins sold 30,000 shares, decreasing his ownership, while Bristol Myers Squibb announced a quarterly dividend and provided FY2026 EPS guidance, despite missing Q4 EPS estimates.

feed.title: Sumitomo Mitsui Trust Group Inc. Cuts Stock Position in Kimberly-Clark Corporation $KMB
feed.summary: Sumitomo Mitsui Trust Group Inc. has reduced its stake in Kimberly-Clark Corporation (KMB) by 3.4%, selling 28,999 shares and now owning 812,649 shares valued at approximately $81.99 million. This move comes as several analysts have lowered their price targets on KMB, resulting in a consensus "Hold" rating and a target price of $114.86. Despite analyst caution, Kimberly-Clark recently increased its quarterly dividend to $1.28, offering an attractive yield of about 5.3%.

feed.title: Sumitomo Mitsui Trust Group Inc. Cuts Position in PPG Industries, Inc. $PPG
feed.summary: Sumitomo Mitsui Trust Group Inc. decreased its stake in PPG Industries by 5.6% in the fourth quarter of the previous year, holding 651,034 shares worth approximately $66.7 million. Despite missing quarterly EPS estimates, PPG's revenue beat expectations, and the company provided FY2026 EPS guidance. Institutional investors own a significant portion of the stock, while insiders have sold shares, and Wall Street analysts generally hold a "Hold" rating for PPG.

feed.title: Massachusetts Financial Services Co. MA Has $65.65 Million Stock Holdings in Motorola Solutions, Inc. $MSI
feed.summary: Massachusetts Financial Services Co. MA reduced its stake in Motorola Solutions (NYSE:MSI) by 8.3% in the fourth quarter, holding 171,277 shares valued at $65.65 million. Other institutional investors also adjusted their positions in MSI, while insiders conducted significant share sales. Analysts currently rate Motorola Solutions as a "Buy" with a consensus target price of $502.50.

feed.title: Sumitomo Mitsui Trust Group Inc. Has $65.63 Million Stock Position in Kraft Heinz Company $KHC
feed.summary: Sumitomo Mitsui Trust Group Inc. reduced its stake in Kraft Heinz Company by 4.1% in Q4, holding 2,706,253 shares valued at approximately $65.63 million. Kraft Heinz reported Q4 EPS of $0.67, beating estimates, but saw a year-over-year revenue decline and negative net margin. The company maintains a quarterly dividend of $0.40, yielding about 7.2%, despite analysts largely holding a "Reduce" rating with a consensus target price of $23.53.

feed.title: Third View Private Wealth LLC Invests $1.13 Million in Walmart Inc. $WMT
feed.summary: Third View Private Wealth LLC has initiated a new position in Walmart Inc. (WMT) during the fourth quarter, purchasing 10,167 shares valued at approximately $1.13 million. This investment comes amidst positive analyst sentiment, with several firms raising price targets and Walmart expanding new revenue streams like Upstream Facility Services and enhancing its AI capabilities. However, the article also notes significant insider selling and Walmart's P/E ratio of 45.6, suggesting a mixed outlook despite strategic growth initiatives.

feed.title: Sumitomo Mitsui Trust Group Inc. Increases Stock Position in Old Dominion Freight Line, Inc. $ODFL
feed.summary: Sumitomo Mitsui Trust Group Inc. significantly increased its stake in Old Dominion Freight Line, Inc. during the fourth quarter, acquiring an additional 15,313 shares to reach a total of 494,041 shares valued at $77.47 million. Despite this, insiders have been net sellers, divesting over 80,000 shares in the last 90 days. The transportation company recently exceeded EPS estimates, raised its quarterly dividend, and holds a consensus "Hold" rating from analysts with a target price of $194.92.

feed.title: Sumitomo Mitsui Trust Group Inc. Reduces Holdings in Mettler-Toledo International, Inc. $MTD
feed.summary: Sumitomo Mitsui Trust Group Inc. reduced its stake in Mettler-Toledo International, Inc. by 4.8% in the fourth quarter, selling 2,375 shares to hold 46,732 shares valued at approximately $65.15 million. This reduction comes amid varied analyst ratings, with an average "Moderate Buy" consensus and a target price of $1,459.58, even as the company recently surpassed quarterly earnings and revenue estimates. Additionally, Mettler-Toledo's CFO, Shawn Vadala, decreased his holdings by over 13% through a sale of 800 shares.

feed.title: Keysight Technologies Inc. $KEYS Shares Sold by Sumitomo Mitsui Trust Group Inc.
feed.summary: Sumitomo Mitsui Trust Group Inc. reduced its stake in Keysight Technologies Inc. by 3.6% in the fourth quarter, selling 14,788 shares. Despite this, institutional investors collectively own 84.58% of the company's stock, and analysts maintain a "Moderate Buy" rating with an average target price of $309.33. Keysight reported strong Q1 earnings, beating expectations with $2.17 EPS and $1.60 billion in revenue, and issued positive FY2026 guidance.

feed.title: Sumitomo Mitsui Trust Group Inc. Lowers Holdings in T. Rowe Price Group, Inc. $TROW
feed.summary: Sumitomo Mitsui Trust Group Inc. reduced its stake in T. Rowe Price Group by 6.7% in Q4 2025, selling 44,594 shares and now holding 624,017 shares valued at $63.89 million. T. Rowe Price recently increased its quarterly dividend to $1.30, resulting in an annualized dividend of $5.20 and a 5.4% yield. Analysts have generally adopted a cautious stance, with an average rating of "Reduce" and an average target price of $97.38.

feed.title: Robeco Institutional Asset Management B.V. Acquires 115,852 Shares of Match Group Inc. $MTCH
feed.summary: Robeco Institutional Asset Management B.V. significantly increased its stake in Match Group Inc. (NASDAQ:MTCH) by 22.7% in the fourth quarter, purchasing an additional 115,852 shares to now own 625,638 shares valued at $20.2 million. Other institutional investors also adjusted their holdings in Match Group, which currently has a "Hold" rating from analysts with a consensus price target of $35.64. The company recently announced a quarterly dividend increase to $0.20 per share, resulting in an annualized dividend of $0.80 and a yield of 2.4%.

feed.title: Sumitomo Mitsui Trust Group Inc. Increases Stock Position in Invitation Home $INVH
feed.summary: Sumitomo Mitsui Trust Group Inc. has increased its stake in Invitation Homes by 3.2% in the fourth quarter of the prior year, now owning 2,413,502 shares valued at approximately $67.07 million. Invitation Homes recently declared a quarterly dividend of $0.30 per share, yielding about 4.5%, despite missing Q4 earnings per share estimates. The company has a consensus "Moderate Buy" rating from analysts with a target price of $32.88.

feed.title: WeRide Inc. (NASDAQ:WRD) Given Average Rating of "Moderate Buy" by Brokerages
feed.summary: Eight brokerages have given WeRide Inc. (NASDAQ:WRD) an average rating of "Moderate Buy," with a consensus one-year target price of $12.48. Despite this positive outlook, the company is currently unprofitable, reporting a Q EPS of ($0.24) and negative return on equity and net margin. Several firms, including HSBC and Citigroup, initiated or reiterated "buy" or "outperform" ratings, though Weiss Ratings issued a "sell" rating.

feed.title: Robeco Institutional Asset Management B.V. Acquires 5,948 Shares of Digital Realty Trust, Inc. $DLR
feed.summary: Robeco Institutional Asset Management B.V. has increased its stake in Digital Realty Trust (NYSE:DLR) by 8.1% in Q4, acquiring an additional 5,948 shares, bringing their total holdings to 79,548 shares valued at $12.31 million. Analysts maintain a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating with an average price target of $196.96. Digital Realty Trust exceeded Q4 earnings expectations with an EPS of $1.86 and reported revenue of $1.63 billion, a 13.8% year-over-year increase, and declared a quarterly dividend of $1.22.
